resources.string: Brass calipers are anointed with purified oil before touching the first gear.

The maintenance attendants entered wearing antistatic robes and set soft brushes beside the open board as if arranging relics. Purified oil was measured along the brass scale, oxidization-purging vapor drifted above the gear train, and each bolt was tightened in the order written on the enamel strip. No hand moved quickly. Entropy was named as sin, friction as failure, and the rescued machine was allowed to forgive the room one measured click at a time.
